calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Discharge Attorney, Pamela Pitt (156395)
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Dawn Moore, Tel. 415.826.0877, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF DAWN MOORE'S Motion To Discharge Attorney, Pamela Pitt (156395) is granted as unopposed. Ms. Pitt no longer represents plaintiff, and plaintiff now represents herself in this action. (Moving party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
